economic_notes: Nation operates grocery store, gas bar, confectionery, restaurant, half-interest in Pinesiw Energy Limited Partnership, Misipawistik Telecommunications Cooperative, VLT lounge, 1/7 interest in Aseneskak Casino, Grand Rapids First Nation Development Trust funded from Manitoba Hydro settlement. Hydro claim against Canada in arbitration for damages related to development on traditional territory.
notes: Going concern note disclosed due to high variable-rate demand loans totalling $33,205,464 (prime+2.50%), with prime rate rising from 2.45% to 7.2%. Deferred revenue increased dramatically from $4.6M to $19.9M primarily due to ISC Cultural Spaces ($7.55M) and Waterplant Upgrade ($4.78M) deferrals, significantly reducing reported revenue. OSR is negative because total government transfers ($37.9M) exceed total revenue ($26.6M) due to large deferred revenue to subsequent year. 5 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 7 entities on modified equity basis. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. Community Development segment includes large ISC capital funding. Hydro damage claim in arbitration.
